name: Holo F1
summary: afflom/F1 — the 𝔽₁ square toward the Riemann Hypothesis (built on UOR-Framework) — made native as a verified object with an honest proven/open ledger, and combined with ATLAS96 by attestation.

description.p: Over a function field, the Riemann Hypothesis follows from the Hodge index theorem's intersection-positivity on the surface C×C. The 𝔽₁ ('field with one element') program seeks the analogue over ℚ: make Spec ℤ a curve over 𝔽₁, so that Spec ℤ ×_𝔽₁ Spec ℤ is an arithmetic surface whose Hodge-index negativity would BE the Riemann Hypothesis. afflom/F1 names, shapes, and partially builds that square it does not construct it.

Holo F1 re-implements no mathematics. It encodes F1 as a self-verifying UOR object whose did:holo re-derives from its own content (Law L5) and which carries faithfully transcribed from F1's own README its honesty ledger: each result tagged `true` (Lean-verified, choice-free) or `null` (open / not asserted proven). The RH crux stays `null`, exactly as F1 marks it.

ul: The honest ledger: 10 proven results (constructive analysis, ζ for Re(s)>1, λ₁>0) and the 3 open items (full Li positivity, the Hodge-index negativity crux, the square itself)
Shared root: F1 is pinned to UOR-Framework v0.5.2, the same Z/(2^n)Z base ATLAS96's octet stands on

Combined with ATLAS96 by ATTESTATION an overlay ledger that re-grades ATLAS96's claims (deterministic unfolding = true; LLM-latent-topology thesis = null; 8K-via-E8 = false) without mutating a byte of the sealed objects
A live in-tab Law-L5 badge: the sealed object re-derives its own identity via Web Crypto

releases.description: Substrate-encode first: afflom/F1 made native to the UOR substrate as a self-verifying UOR object (dual-axis sha256 + blake3 κ) carrying its honest proven/open ledger transcribed from F1's README, linked to the shared UOR-Framework root and to ATLAS96's E₈ terminus. Combined with ATLAS96 by an overlay claim-ledger that applies F1's honesty convention (true/null/false) and binds the live atlas-e8 objects by content address mutating nothing. Witnessed 23/23 (Law-L5 re-derivation + honesty invariant + attachment integrity).
